issues.detail: Missing error handling for API failures and edge cases such as large memory or invalid JSON responses.
Skill file contains extensive narrative explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
Implementation is Python-specific, limiting compatibility with other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Self-improving Python agent with persisted preferences
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a class that persists config to a JSON file across instantiations, runs a reflection LLM call returning structured JSON with NEW_FACTS/PREFERENCES, and only updates the system prompt via the reflection pipeline rather than letting user input overwrite it; baseline shows a generic memory dict without disk persistence or a separate reflection model.

scenarios.name: Avoid degrading good behavior during self-improvement
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the documented QUALITY_SCORE < 7 guard, uses claude-haiku-4-5 as a cheaper reflection model, and bumps config version on prompt merges; baseline gives generic LLM evaluation advice without the specific threshold or version bump pattern.
